Daman and Diu

Capital: Daman

Famous Food: Seafood & Coastal Gujarati Thali

Major Festival: Nariyal Poornima & Garba

Overview

Daman and Diu are historic coastal enclaves blending Portuguese colonial forts, beaches, and Gujarati traditions.

Story

Daman and Diu are historic coastal enclaves blending Portuguese colonial forts, beaches, and Gujarati traditions.

The vibrant region of Daman and Diu is governed from its beautiful capital, Daman. The land is deeply connected to its roots, celebrating grand occasions like Nariyal Poornima & Garba with unmatched energy and devotion.

Visitors from around the world are mesmerized by the local culinary delights, particularly the iconic Seafood & Coastal Gujarati Thali, which represents centuries of refined regional cooking techniques and traditional spices. A journey to Daman and Diu is a journey through time, culture, and nature.

Back to Home
